codeReview.summary: The feature adds parser-only semantic fixture builders and focused regression tests in crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs that cover the required reordered-equivalent payloads, embedded-zero records, same-size collisions, layout variants, and valid/invalid ownership graphs. I did not find blocking or non-blocking correctness issues in the reviewed commit.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill, architecture guidance, and commit be83c44. The implementation stays within the parser-only test surface, follows the dwg-fixture-worker procedure, and provides the expected semantic fixture corpus without introducing runtime DWG rollout changes.
